types:type.name: create_covid_case_request
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type create_covid_case_request = {| source: String, caseType: String, firstname: String, lastName: String, phone: String, email: String, dateOfBirth: String, nationalID: String, nationalIDType: String, address: {| streetAddress: String, city: String, state: String, postal: String, country: String |} |} {"example": "{\\\"source\\\":\\\"Hospital1\\\",\\\"caseType\\\":\\\"positive\\\",\\\"firstname\\\":\\\"John\\\",\\\"lastName\\\":\\\"Nixon\\\",\\\"phone\\\":\\\"541-754-3010\\\",\\\"email\\\":\\\"john@gmail.com\\\",\\\"dateOfBirth\\\":\\\"1989-04-26\\\",\\\"nationalID\\\":\\\"209-49-6193\\\",\\\"nationalIDType\\\":\\\"SSN\\\",\\\"address\\\":{\\\"streetAddress\\\":\\\"1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW\\\",\\\"city\\\":\\\"Washington\\\",\\\"state\\\":\\\"DC\\\",\\\"postal\\\":\\\"20500\\\",\\\"country\\\":\\\"USA\\\"}}"}

types:type.name: auto_1f65c422-c9d1-4544-8c8c-33d05f37f3e1_Input-Attributes
auto_1f65c422-c9d1-4544-8c8c-33d05f37f3e1_Output-Variables-covideCasePayload
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_1f65c422_c9d1_4544_8c8c_33d05f37f3e1_Output_Variables_covideCasePayload = {| source: String, caseType: String, firstName: Null, lastName: String, phone: String, email: String, dateOfBirth: String, nationalId: String, nationalIdType: String, streetAddresses: String, city: String, state: String, postal: String, country: String, createDate: String, updateDate: String, createBy: String, updateBy: String |}

types:type.name: auto_4fe0c5df-4da9-4498-9aa5-d5cb0a90de2b_Input-Attributes
auto_4fe0c5df-4da9-4498-9aa5-d5cb0a90de2b_Output-Variables-updateCovidCasePayload
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_4fe0c5df_4da9_4498_9aa5_d5cb0a90de2b_Output_Variables_updateCovidCasePayload = {| caseId: Null, source: Null, caseType: Null, firstName: Null, lastName: Null, phone: Null, email: Null, dateOfBirth: Null, nationalId: Null, nationalIdType: Null, streetAddress: Null, city: Null, state: Null, postal: Null, country: Null, updateDate: String {"format": "yyyy-MM-dd"} |}

types:type.name: auto_545e057c-feb6-4de1-9926-230e7a9759f9_Input-Attributes
auto_545e057c-feb6-4de1-9926-230e7a9759f9_Output-Payload
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_545e057c_feb6_4de1_9926_230e7a9759f9_Output_Payload = {| code: Number, message: String, description: String | Null, dateTime: String {"format": "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, transactionId: Null |}
